title: Prescriptive CycloneDX BOM Schema v1.6 (Derived from ECMA-424 Spec)
description: A comprehensive and prescriptive JSON schema for the CycloneDX Bill of Materials (BOM) specification v1.6, derived directly from the normative language of the ECMA-424 standard. This schema enforces all REQUIRED/MUST constraints and embeds all RECOMMENDED/SHOULD best practices in descriptions.

bomFormat.description: Specifies the format of the BOM. This value MUST be 'CycloneDX'.

specVersion.description: The version of the CycloneDX specification the BOM conforms to. For this schema, the value MUST be '1.6'.

serialNumber.description: A unique serial number for the BOM. If specified, it MUST conform to RFC 4122 (urn:uuid:*). Recommendation: Every BOM generated SHOULD have a unique serial number, even if the contents have not changed. Use of serial numbers is recommended.

version.description: The version of the BOM. Recommendation: Whenever an existing BOM is modified, the version of the BOM SHOULD be incremented by 1. When a system is presented with multiple BOMs with identical serial numbers, it SHOULD use the most recent version.

metadata.description: Provides additional information about the BOM. This property is Optional.

components.description: A list of software, hardware, and data components. This property is Optional.

services.description: A list of services. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: Provides the ability to document external references to the BOM. This property is Optional.

dependencies.description: A dependency graph of components and services. This property is Optional. Components or services that do not have their own dependencies MUST be declared as empty elements within the graph.

compositions.description: Compositions describe the completeness of the BOM. This property is Optional.

vulnerabilities.description: A list of known vulnerabilities. This property is Optional.

annotations.description: Provides a mechanism to annotate the BOM with external information. This property is Optional.

formulation.description: Describes how the BOM was formulated. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be a Formula object.

declarations.description: Provides a mechanism for making assertions about the BOM. This property is Optional.

definitions.description: Provides a mechanism for defining custom definitions. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Provides the ability to add custom properties to the BOM. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

signature.description: An optional digital signature of the BOM. All items MUST be unique.

metadata.description: Provides additional information about a BOM.

timestamp.description: The date and time (UTC) when the BOM was created. This property is Optional.

lifecycles.description: The lifecycle phase(s) in which data in the BOM was captured. Each item MUST be a Lifecycle object. This property is Optional.

tools.description: The tool(s) used in the creation, enrichment, and validation of the BOM. The object MUST be one of 'Tools' or 'Tools (legacy)'. This property is Optional.

authors.description: The person(s) who created the BOM. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object. This property is Optional.

component.description: The component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional.

manufacturer.description: The organization that created the BOM. This property is Optional.

manufacture.description: [Deprecated] The organization that manufactured the component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

supplier.description: The organization that supplied the component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional.

licenses.description: The license information for the BOM document itself. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Provides the ability to add custom properties to the BOM metadata. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

lifecycle.description: Describes a phase of the product lifecycle. The object MUST be one of 'Pre-Defined Phase' or 'Custom Phase'.

phase.description: A pre-defined phase in the product lifecycle. This property is Required.

name.description: The name of the custom lifecycle phase. This property is Required.

description.description: A description of the custom lifecycle phase. This property is Optional.

tools.description: A container for component and service tools used to create the BOM.

components.description: A list of software and hardware components used as tools. Each item MUST be a Component object and all items MUST be unique.

services.description: A list of services used as tools. Each item MUST be a Service object and all items MUST be unique.

toolsLegacy.description: [Deprecated] A list of legacy tool objects used to create the BOM. Each item MUST be a Tool object.

tool.description: [Deprecated] Information about an automated or manual tool used. Use 'component' or 'service' instead.

hashes.description: The hashes of the tool. Each item MUST be a Hash object.

externalReferences.description: External references for the tool. Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

hash.description: Specifies a cryptographic hash and its algorithm.

alg.description: The algorithm that generated the hash value. The algorithm MUST be one of the enumerated values.

content.description: The value of the hash. This property is Required.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier which can be used to reference the object elsewhere in the BOM. Every bom-ref MUST be unique within the BOM. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

url.description: The URL(s) of the organization. Each item MUST be a string.

contact.description: The contact(s) for the organization. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object.

organizationalContact.description: Defines a contact at an organization.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier which can be used to reference the object elsewhere in the BOM. Every bom-ref MUST be unique within the BOM. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.
An optional identifier for the address. Every bom-ref MUST be unique within the BOM. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

name.description: The name of the property. This property is Required.

component.description: A software, hardware, or data component.

type.description: Specifies the type of component. This property is Required. Recommendations: For software, classify as 'application' if no more specific classification is available. If a library has key features of a framework, it SHOULD be classified as a framework. If unknown, specifying 'library' is recommended. A hardware device with firmware SHOULD include a component for the hardware and another for the firmware/OS.

mime-type.description: The mime-type of the component. This property is Optional.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier which can be used to reference the component elsewhere in the BOM. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

supplier.description: The supplier of the component. This property is Optional.

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer of the component. This property is Optional.

authors.description: The authors of the component. This property is Optional.

author.description: [Deprecated] Use 'authors' instead. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

publisher.description: The publisher of the component. This property is Optional.

group.description: The group of the component. This property is Optional. Recommendation: Whitespace and special characters SHOULD be avoided.

name.description: The name of the component. This property is Required.

version.description: The version of the component. This property is Optional. Recommendation: The version SHOULD ideally comply with semantic versioning.

description.description: A description of the component. This property is Optional.

scope.description: The scope of the component. This property is Optional. Recommendation: If scope is not specified, 'required' scope SHOULD be assumed by the consumer.

hashes.description: A list of cryptographic hashes of the component. Each item MUST be a Hash object. This property is Optional.

licenses.description: The license(s) of the component. This property is Optional. The property MUST be one of: 'Multiple licenses' or 'SPDX License Expression'.

copyright.description: The copyright statement of the component. This property is Optional.

cpe.description: The Common Platform Enumeration (CPE) of the component. The CPE MUST conform to the CPE 2.2 or 2.3 specification. This property is Optional.

purl.description: The Package URL (purl) of the component. If specified, the purl MUST be valid and conform to the purl-spec. This property is Optional.

omniborId.description: The OmniBOR Artifact Identifier (gitoid) of the component. If specified, the OmniBOR MUST be valid. This property is Optional.

swhid.description: The Software Heritage Identifier (SWHID) of the component. If specified, the SWHID MUST be valid. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

swid.description: The Software Identification (SWID) tag of the component. This property is Optional.

modified.description: [Deprecated] Use 'pedigree' instead. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

pedigree.description: Component pedigree describes the provenance of a component. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: External references to the component. Each item MUST be an External Reference object. This property is Optional.

components.description: A list of nested sub-components. All items MUST be unique.

evidence.description: Provides evidence of the component's existence. This property is Optional.

releaseNotes.description: Release notes for the component. This property is Optional.

modelCard.description: The model card for a machine learning model component. Recommendation: This object SHOULD be specified for any component of type 'machine-learning-model' and MUST NOT be specified for other component types. This property is Optional.

data.description: The data classification for a data component. Recommendation: This object SHOULD be specified for any component of type 'data' and MUST NOT be specified for other component types. This property is Optional.

cryptoProperties.description: Cryptographic properties of the asset. This property is Optional.

tags.description: Tags associated with the component. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Custom properties of the component. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. This property is Optional.

signature.description: An optional digital signature of the component. All items MUST be unique.

service.description: Defines a service (external API or network resource). This object includes its full definition.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

group.description: Recommendation: Whitespace and special characters SHOULD be avoided in the group property.

name.description: The name of the service. This property is Required.

endpoints.description: The endpoint URIs. Each item MUST be a string.

externalReferences.description: Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

services.description: Nested sub-services. All items MUST be unique.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional for properties.

tags.description: Each item MUST be a string.

signature.description: An optional digital signature of the service. All items MUST be unique.

url.description: The URI (URL or URN) to the external reference. This property is Required. The url property MUST be any of: URL, BOM-Link Element.

comment.description: An optional comment describing the external reference. This property is Optional.

type.description: Specifies the type of external reference. This property is Required.

hashes.description: The hashes of the external reference. Each item MUST be a Hash object. This property is Optional.

ref.description: References a component or service by its bom-ref attribute. This property is Required.

dependsOn.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the dependencies. Each item MUST be a string. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

provides.description: The bom-ref identifiers of components or services defining a specification. Each item MUST be a string. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

aggregate.description: Specifies how complete a relationship is. This property is Required.

assemblies.description: The bom-ref identifiers of components or services assembled. Each item MUST be a Ref or BOM-Link Element. All items MUST be unique.

dependencies.description: The bom-ref identifiers of dependencies. Each item MUST be a string. All items MUST be unique.

vulnerabilities.description: The bom-ref identifiers of vulnerabilities. Each item MUST be a string. All items MUST be unique.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

ratings.description: Each item MUST be a Rating object.

cwes.description: List of Common Weaknesses Enumerations (CWEs) codes. Minimum value for items is 1. Each item MUST be an integer.

detail.description: Recommendation: If a vulnerability is not exploitable, the detail field SHOULD include specific details on why the component or service is not impacted.

advisories.description: Each item MUST be an Advisory object.

tools.description: The tool(s) used to identify, confirm, or score the vulnerability. The object MUST be one of 'Tools' or 'Tools (legacy)'.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

subjects.description: The object in the BOM identified by its bom-ref. Each subject MUST be any of: Ref, BOM-Link Element. All items MUST be unique.

annotator.description: The organization, person, component, or service which created the textual content of the annotation. This property is Required. The object MUST be one of: Organizational Entity, Organizational Contact, Component, or Service.

timestamp.description: The date and time (timestamp) when the annotation was created. This property is Required.

text.description: The textual content of the annotation. This property is Required.

signature.description: An optional digital signature of the annotation. All items MUST be unique.

formula.description: Describes workflows and resources that captures rules and other aspects of how the associated BOM component or service was formed. Each item MUST be a Formula object.

assessors.description: The list of assessors. Each item MUST be an Assessor object.

attestations.description: The list of attestations. Each item MUST be an Attestation object.

claims.description: The list of claims. Each item MUST be a Claim object.

evidence.description: The list of evidence. Each item MUST be an Evidence object.

standards.description: The list of standards. Each item MUST be a Standard object.

id.description: An identifier that uniquely identifies the vulnerability. This property is Required.

source.description: The source that published the vulnerability. This property is Required.

url.description: Location where the advisory can be obtained. This property is Required.

organizations.description: The organizations credited with vulnerability discovery. Each item MUST be an Organizational Entity object.

individuals.description: The individuals credited with vulnerability discovery. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object.

state.description: Recommendation: Justification SHOULD be specified for all 'not_affected' cases.

response.description: Recommendation: Responses are strongly encouraged for vulnerabilities where the analysis state is exploitable. Each item MUST be a string.

detail.description: Recommendation: If a vulnerability is not exploitable, the detail field SHOULD include specific details on why the component or service is not impacted.

ref.description: References a component or service by its bom-ref attribute. This property is Required. The property MUST be any of: Ref or BOM-Link Element.

versions.description: Zero or more individual versions or range of versions. All items MUST be unique.

signature.description: An enveloped digital signature embedded within and specific to this object.

aliases.description: Each item MUST be a string.

tags.description: Each item MUST be a string.

resolves.description: Each item MUST be an Issue object.

notes.description: Each item MUST be a Note object.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

text.description: The content of the note. This property is Required.

modelCard.description: The model card for a machine learning model component.

bom-ref.description: A unique identifier for the model card. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

properties.description: Custom properties for the model card. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

modelParameters.description: Parameters of the machine learning model.

datasets.description: Datasets used in the model. Each item MUST be one of 'Inline Data Information' or 'Data Reference'.

inputs.description: Input parameters for the model. Each item MUST be an Input and Output Parameters object.

outputs.description: Output parameters for the model. Each item MUST be an Input and Output Parameters object.

bom-ref.description: A unique identifier for the data. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

type.description: The type of data. This property is Required.

sensitiveData.description: A list of sensitive data types. Each item MUST be a string.

properties.description: Configuration properties. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

bom-ref.description: A unique identifier for the data. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

type.description: The type of data. This property is Required.

sensitiveData.description: A list of sensitive data types. Each item MUST be a string.

assetType.description: The type of cryptographic asset. This property is Required.

curve.description: Recommendation: Use curve names as defined at https://neuromancer.sk/std/.

certificationLevel.description: Each item MUST be a string and one of the enumerated values.

cryptoFunctions.description: Each item MUST be a string and one of the enumerated values.

securedBy.description: The mechanism by which the cryptographic asset is secured.

cipherSuites.description: Each item MUST be a Cipher Suite object.

cryptoRefArray.description: A list of protocol-related cryptographic assets. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

algorithms.description: A list of algorithms related to the cipher suite. Each item MUST be a string.

identifiers.description: A list of common identifiers for the cipher suite. Each item MUST be a string.

encr.description: Encryption Algorithm (ENCR). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

prf.description: Pseudorandom Function (PRF). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

integ.description: Integrity Algorithm (INTEG). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

ke.description: Key Exchange Method (KE). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

auth.description: IKEv2 Authentication method. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

flow.description: Specifies the flow direction of the data. This property is Required.

classification.description: Data classification tags data. This property is Required.

source.description: The URI, URL, or BOM-Link of the components or services the data came in from. Each item MUST be a URL or BOM-Link Element.

destination.description: The URI, URL, or BOM-Link of the components or services the data is sent to. Each item MUST be a URL or BOM-Link Element.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

claims.description: The list of bom-ref to the claims being attested to. Each item MUST be a string.

counterClaims.description: The list of bom-ref to the counter claims being attested to. Each item MUST be a string.

mitigationStrategies.description: The list of bom-ref to the evidence provided describing the mitigation strategies. Each item MUST be a string.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

mitigationStrategies.description: The list of bom-ref to the evidence provided. Each item MUST be a string. Recommendation: Each mitigation strategy SHOULD include an explanation of how any weaknesses in the evidence will be mitigated.

evidence.description: The list of bom-ref to evidence that supports this claim. Each item MUST be a string.

counterEvidence.description: The list of bom-ref to counterEvidence. Each item MUST be a string.

externalReferences.description: Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

data.description: The output or analysis that supports claims. Each item MUST be a Data object.

sensitiveData.description: Each item MUST be a string.

organizations.description: The list of organizations. Each item MUST be an Organizational Entity object.

services.description: Each item MUST be a Service object.

signatories.description: The list of signatories. Each item MUST be a Signatory object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

externalReferences.description: Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

descriptions.description: The supplemental text. Each item MUST be a string.

openCre.description: The Common Requirements Enumeration (CRE) identifier(s). Each item MUST be a string.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

externalReferences.description: Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

requirements.description: The list of requirement bom-refs. Each item MUST be a string.

altIds.description: Each item MUST be a string.

licenseTypes.description: Each item MUST be a string.

supportingMaterial.description: Each item MUST be an Attachment object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. This property is Required. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the resource instance. This property is Required.

taskTypes.description: Indicates the types of activities performed. Each item MUST be a string.

runtimeTopology.description: Each item MUST be a Dependency object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. This property is Required. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

uid.description: The unique identifier. This property is Required.

type.description: The source type of event which caused the trigger to fire. This property is Required.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. This property is Required. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

uid.description: The unique identifier. This property is Required.

environmentVars.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. This property is Required. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

uid.description: The unique identifier. This property is Required.

resourceReferenceChoice.description: A resource reference MUST be any of: Ref, BOM-Link Element, or External Reference.

ref.description: Descriptor for an element identified by the attribute 'bom-ref' in the same BOM document.

bomLinkElement.description: Descriptor for an element in a BOM document, referencing a full object via a BOM-Link.

bom-ref.description: Identifier for referable and interlinkable elements. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:' to avoid conflicts with BOM-Links.

mitigationStrategies.description: The list of bom-ref to the evidence describing mitigation strategies. Each item MUST be a string. Recommendation: Each mitigation strategy SHOULD include an explanation of how any weaknesses in the evidence will be mitigated.

evidence.description: The list of bom-ref to evidence that supports this claim. Each item MUST be a string.

counterEvidence.description: The list of bom-ref to counterEvidence that supports this claim. Each item MUST be a string.

externalReferences.description: Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

openCre.description: The Common Requirements Enumeration (CRE) identifier(s). Each item MUST be a string. This property is Required.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. This property is Required. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.
